overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval harbor town during golden hour. The character moves from a wooden dock along the water through narrow alleys and into the town center, with warm sunset lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden harbor dock with moored sailing ship

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock, observing the sailing ship and harbor surroundings

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the harbor walkway
large wooden vessel with yellow sails moored at the dock
stacked oak barrels for cargo storage
stone fortress visible across the water on a rocky outcrop
calm reflective water of the harbor basin

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a wooden harbor dock during golden hour, with a large sailing ship moored to the right and a distant castle visible across the calm water. The scene is open and serene with warm sunlight casting long shadows on the weathered planks.

events.description: character ascends wooden stairs from dock into warehouse building

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs and entering a warehouse building from the dock

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase leading up from the dock level
large timber-framed storage building with open entrance
rough wooden railing along the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the open dock behind, ascending wooden stairs into a warehouse building. The lighting shifts to a mix of warm exterior sun and interior shadows as Geralt enters the timber-framed structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered alley between stone buildings

events.description: exits warehouse into narrow alleyway with stone walls
enters covered wooden passage with dappled light filtering through gaps

agents.ego_description: navigating through tight alleyways and covered passages between buildings

notable_agents.action: shirtless laborer walking through the alley

entered.detail: arched stone passage leading deeper into the town
roofed wooden passage with beams and slats overhead
rough-hewn stone building walls lining the narrow path

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves through narrow, shadowy alleyways between stone buildings, transitioning from the warehouse into a covered wooden passage. The environment becomes enclosed and darker, with dappled sunlight filtering through overhead beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town square with stone architecture

events.description: exits narrow alley into open town square with cobblestone streets

agents.ego_description: walking through the open town square, observing the architecture and passing townsfolk

notable_agents.action: woman in medieval dress walking past the camera
man standing near a market stall

entered.detail: open cobblestone plaza surrounded by historic buildings
multi-story medieval stone houses with arched doorways
distant mountain range visible beyond the town

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow alley, the scene opens into a sunlit town square with cobblestone streets and stone buildings. Pedestrians walk through the plaza as the warm golden hour light illuminates the medieval architecture and distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street leading toward hillside fortress

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through the town streets toward the fortress visible on the hillside

notable_agents.action: man in gray tunic walking ahead on the street
woman in green dress walking opposite direction

entered.detail: distinctive red plaster and stone building with arched windows
large stone castle or fortress atop the hill ahead
empty wooden wagon parked along the street

segments.scene_description: The character continues through cobblestone streets, passing a distinctive red building and walking toward a large fortress visible on the hillside ahead. The street gently ascends as other townsfolk walk through the warm evening light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, serene harbor dock into the dense, bustling heart of a medieval town during the golden hour. It begins with Geralt walking along weathered wooden planks beside a moored sailing ship, with a distant castle reflecting in the calm water. As he leaves the dock, the camera follows him up wooden stairs and into a timber-framed warehouse, where the open sunlight shifts into a mix of interior shadows and dappled light filtering through narrow, covered alleyways. The scene then expands as he emerges from the enclosure into a sunlit cobblestone square filled with pedestrians and illuminated stone architecture. Finally, the path leads through the town's streets past a distinctive red building, ascending gently toward a large fortress perched on the hillside under the warm evening glow.
